heading: Transferred
label: 61g–4 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 61g–4 was editorially reclassified as .section 6156 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 61g–4, , , , authorized Secretary of Conference of Majority and Secretary of Conference of Minority each to appoint and fix compensation of an Executive Assistant and a Secretary. These positions were abolished by , effective .Pub. L. 95–26, title I, § 10091 Stat. 80section 102 of Pub. L. 96–38May 4, 1977Oct. 1, 1979
